prompt: A highly detailed, {argument name="art style" default="hyper-realistic cinematic 3D render"} of an {argument name="historical setting" default="ancient Chinese street scene inspired by Along the River During the Qingming Festival"}. The elevated, wide-angle perspective looks down upon a bustling dirt crossroad surrounded by traditional wooden buildings with intricate grey tiled roofs. On the left, a building features a sign reading "安居客栈" with red lanterns hanging outside. The scene is densely populated with dozens of villagers, merchants, and travelers in traditional period clothing. People are engaged in various activities: carrying woven baskets on shoulder poles, tending to market stalls under large wooden parasols, riding horses, and pulling a wooden cart with large spoked wheels in the lower right. A large, leafy green tree stands centrally among the shops, and weeping willow branches frame the extreme left foreground. The atmosphere is lively and dusty, illuminated by {argument name="lighting" default="warm afternoon sunlight"} that casts sharp, intricate shadows across the highly textured, hyper-detailed environment.
translatedPrompt: 一幅高度细节化的 {argument name="art style" default="超写实电影级 3D 渲染图"}，展现了 {argument name="historical setting" default="灵感源自《清明上河图》的中国古代街景"}。采用俯瞰的广角视角，俯瞰着一个熙熙攘攘的土路十字路口，四周环绕着带有精致灰瓦屋顶的传统木质建筑。左侧的一座建筑挂着写有“安居客栈”的招牌，门外悬挂着红灯笼。场景中挤满了数十名身着传统古装的村民、商人和旅人。人们正在进行各种活动：挑着担子运送编织篮、在大型木伞下照看摊位、骑马，右下角还有人拉着一辆带有大辐条轮的木车。商店中央矗立着一棵枝繁叶茂的绿树，垂柳枝条勾勒出最左侧的前景。氛围生动且带有尘土气息，在 {argument name="lighting" default="温暖的午后阳光"} 的照耀下，在纹理丰富、细节极其精细的环境中投射出清晰而复杂的阴影。

breakdown.creativeCore: 写实的中国古代街景：生成一幅灵感源自中国古典卷轴画、细节极其丰富且熙熙攘攘的历史街景。
breakdown.subject: 产品
constraints: 过度真实导致细节瑕疵显眼
breakdown.bestUse: 节日海报、城市印象、传统文化视觉、地域品牌

analysis.copyTemplate:
Create a 海报/封面 image for [用途/受众].

Main subject:
[主体]，[数量/状态/动作]，[关键外观/材质/身份]。

Scene:
[地点/环境]，[时间/天气/时代]，[背景元素]。

Composition:
[景别/角度/版式层级/主体位置]。

Visual style:
[参考风格: realistic, cinematic, 3d]。

Lighting and camera:
[光线/镜头/景深/质感]。

Text requirements:
包含文字或排版元素。

Quality constraints:
clean, coherent, polished, readable hierarchy, no random text, no visual clutter.
